_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: we chose to employ primary embryonic spinal cord (SC) NPC cultures from Nf2 floxed mice (Nf2flox/flox; [13]) in which merlin expression could be eliminated following adenoviral delivery of Cre recombinase
details: Primary embryonic spinal cord NPCs from Nf2flox/flox mice used for conditional Nf2 inactivation via adenoviral Cre delivery
